testcase.name: unauthenticated users cannot access households
testcase.error:
unauthenticated users cannot access householdsIlluminate\Database\QueryException: could not find driver (Connection: sqlite, Database: :memory:, SQL: select exists (select 1 from "main".sqlite_master where name = 'migrations' and type = 'table') as "exists") at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Database\Connectors\Connector.php:66 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Database\Connectors\Connector.php:44 at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Database\Connectors\SQLiteConnector.php:21 at testcase.name: user can create a household and is attached as admin
testcase.file: tests\Feature\HouseholdApiTest.php::user can create a household and is attached as admin
testcase.error:
user can create a household and is attached as adminIlluminate\Database\QueryException: could not find driver (Connection: sqlite, Database: :memory:, SQL: select exists (select 1 from "main".sqlite_master where name = 'migrations' and type = 'table') as "exists") at vendor\laravel\framework\src\Illuminate\Database\Connectors\Connector.php:66 at testcase.name: tenant isolation: user cannot see households they do not belong to

tenant isolation: user cannot see households they do not belong toIlluminate\Database\QueryException: could not find driver (Connection: sqlite, Database: :memory:, SQL: select exists (select 1 from testcase.name: authorization: only admins can invite users to a household
testcase.file: tests\Feature\HouseholdApiTest.php::authorization: only admins can invite users to a household
